race.comment: LADY MONEY TALK (11) tackled much stronger races at her last campaign and has switched to the Fiore barn since her last run in August 2025. Her trial leading into this was solid and she rates highly on her form last campaign. Can return with a bang. PEIGI (9) finished off strongly over the 1100m journey here last time when beaten 2L. The rise in trip looks suitable for her now and she maps to sit a lot closer from an inside barrier. Showed promise last start and can build on that effort now. WHO'S TALKING (2) is also first-up today and has been strong at the trials coming in. Yuill takes the ride for the new stable and if he can pick up from where he left off, he'll take beating. GOD'LL GETYA (1) has just missed his past couple and gets the blinkers on first time today. Can notch up his maiden win. I'M ALL THE FUNK (6) has claims from a better draw today.
